narrative.description: Rocket League is a competitive sports game where rocket-powered cars hit a ball into the opponent's goal in fast-paced 3v3 or team matches.
narrative.core_loop: Drive, jump, and boost to strike the ball, coordinate rotations with teammates, and score goals within timed matches across ranked or casual playlists.

mechanics.map_notes: In Rocket League, floppy character bodies interact with physics objects to solve environmental puzzles.
mechanics.expression: In Rocket League, floppy character bodies interact with physics objects to solve environmental puzzles.

mechanics.map_notes: In Rocket League, same-screen or local wireless play pits players against each other in shared sessions.
mechanics.expression: In Rocket League, same-screen or local wireless play pits players against each other in shared sessions.

mechanics.map_notes: In Rocket League, matches are divided into rounds with separate health pools; winning a set number of rounds wins the match.
mechanics.expression: In Rocket League, matches are divided into rounds with separate health pools; winning a set number of rounds wins the match.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Rocket League through its core sports loop.
